title: Agent Rule Frontmatter
description: Schema for validating the YAML frontmatter of structured agent rule files.

name.description: Kebab-case identifier for the rule. Must match the filename stem.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this rule covers. Used by agents to decide relevance.

paths.description: Glob patterns (gitignore-style) for file-scoped activation. When trigger is 'auto', the rule activates when the agent accesses files matching any pattern. When discovery is true, patterns are advisory until the rule is finalized.

keywords.description: Prompt keywords for activation. When trigger is 'auto', the rule also activates if the user's prompt contains any keyword. When discovery is true, keywords are advisory until the rule is finalized.

discovery.description: When true, the rule is draft seeking agentic guidance. Activation metadata is not finalized and paths/keywords are advisory until graduation. Validators should emit a default warning when this field is true.

priority.description: Conflict resolution priority. Higher values take precedence when rules conflict.

tags.description: Organizational grouping tags. No semantic effect -- used for filtering and documentation.
